title: crotalaria cyanea
intro: Crotalaria cyanea, also known as Bluebush or Blue Rattlebox, is a flowering plant in the legume family, native to tropical Africa and southern parts of Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antihelmintic to expel intestinal parasites. Crotalaria cyanea can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
